entry.name: aiosfoundation-openagi-download
entry.description: OpenAGI is a package of LLM agents for developing and deploying. It offers a framework to create intelligent agents for performing complex tasks and interacting with users.

entry.name: aiosfoundation-openagi-base
entry.description: OpenAGI is a package of LLM agents for developing and deploying. It offers a framework to create intelligent agents for performing complex tasks and interacting with users.

entry.name: aiosfoundation-openagi
entry.description: OpenAGI is a package of LLM agents for developing and deploying. It offers a framework to create intelligent agents for performing complex tasks and interacting with users.

entry.name: aiosfoundation-openagi-upload
entry.description: OpenAGI is a package of LLM agents for developing and deploying. It offers a framework to create intelligent agents for performing complex tasks and interacting with users.

entry.name: crewai
entry.description: CrewAI is a platform that allows users to build and deploy automated workflows using multiple AI agents that collaborate to perform complex tasks.

entry.name: foundation-fieldbus
entry.description: Foundation Fieldbus (FF) is an all-digital, serial, two-way communications system that serves as the base-level network in a plant or factory automation environment.

entry.name: instagram-create
entry.description: Instagram is an online photo-sharing, video-sharing and social networking service that enables its users to take pictures and videos, and share them on a variety of social networking platforms.

entry.name: instagram-delete
entry.description: Instagram is an online photo-sharing, video-sharing and social networking service that enables its users to take pictures and videos, and share them on a variety of social networking platforms.

entry.name: instagram-edit
entry.description: Instagram is an online photo-sharing, video-sharing and social networking service that enables its users to take pictures and videos, and share them on a variety of social networking platforms.

entry.name: instagram-post
entry.description: Instagram is an online photo-sharing, video-sharing and social networking service that enables its users to take pictures and videos, and share them on a variety of social networking platforms.

entry.name: jira-create
entry.description: JIRA is a Java EE web-based bug tracking and issue tracking application developed by Atlassian Software Systems. Although JIRA is a commercial product, it is freely available to open source projects and non-profit institutions.

entry.name: jira-delete
entry.description: JIRA is a Java EE web-based bug tracking and issue tracking application developed by Atlassian Software Systems. Although JIRA is a commercial product, it is freely available to open source projects and non-profit institutions.

entry.name: jira-share
entry.description: JIRA is a Java EE web-based bug tracking and issue tracking application developed by Atlassian Software Systems. Although JIRA is a commercial product, it is freely available to open source projects and non-profit institutions.

entry.name: ms-mice
entry.description: Miracast over Infrastructure Connection Establishment Protocol is an extension of the Miracast wireless display technology that enables screen mirroring over existing network infrastructure, such as Wi-Fi or Ethernet, rather than relying solely on Wi-Fi Direct. It specifies a connection negotiation sequence that is used to connect and disconnect from a Miracast over Infrastructure device.

entry.name: ms-teams-create
entry.description: Microsoft Teams is a platform that combines workplace chat, meetings, notes, and attachments. This App-ID identifies traffic of creating groups, teams, and meetings.

entry.name: ms-teams-delete
entry.description: Microsoft Teams is a platform that combines workplace chat, meetings, notes, and attachments. This App-ID covers traffic of deleting teams, groups, and meetings.

entry.name: ms-teams-invite
entry.description: Microsoft Teams is a platform that combines workplace chat, meetings, notes, and attachments. This App-ID covers traffic of inviting users to teams.

entry.name: ms-teams-join
entry.description: Microsoft Teams is a platform that combines workplace chat, meetings, notes, and attachments. This App-ID covers traffic of joining teams, groups, and meetings.

entry.name: notion-ai
entry.description: Notion is a unified workspace for teams, such as note-taking, task management, and project management. Notion AI is integrated into your Notion workspace so that you can unlock knowledge, answers, and ideas with just a click.

entry.name: ntcip-ftp
entry.description: National Transportation Communications for Intelligent Transportation System (ITS) Protocol (NTCIP) is a family of standards that provides both the rules for communicating (called protocols) and the vocabulary (called objects) necessary to allow electronic traffic control equipment from different manufacturers to operate with each other as a system. One such communication protocol leveraged by NTCIP is FTP (File Transfer Protocol).

entry.name: ntcip-sfmp
entry.description: National Transportation Communications for Intelligent Transportation System (ITS) Protocol (NTCIP) is a family of standards that provides both the rules for communicating (called protocols) and the vocabulary (called objects) necessary to allow electronic traffic control equipment from different manufacturers to operate with each other as a system. One such communication protocol leveraged by NTCIP is SFMP (Simple Fixed Message Protocol).

entry.name: ntcip-snmp
entry.description: National Transportation Communications for Intelligent Transportation System (ITS) Protocol (NTCIP) is a family of standards that provides both the rules for communicating (called protocols) and the vocabulary (called objects) necessary to allow electronic traffic control equipment from different manufacturers to operate with each other as a system. One such communication protocol leveraged by NTCIP is SNMP (Simple Network Management Protocol).

entry.name: ntcip-snmp-trap
entry.description: National Transportation Communications for Intelligent Transportation System (ITS) Protocol (NTCIP) is a family of standards that provides both the rules for communicating (called protocols) and the vocabulary (called objects) necessary to allow electronic traffic control equipment from different manufacturers to operate with each other as a system. One such communication protocol leveraged by NTCIP is SNMP-TRAP (Simple Network Management Protocol TRAP notification).

entry.name: ntcip-stmp
entry.description: National Transportation Communications for Intelligent Transportation System (ITS) Protocol (NTCIP) is a family of standards that provides both the rules for communicating (called protocols) and the vocabulary (called objects) necessary to allow electronic traffic control equipment from different manufacturers to operate with each other as a system. One such communication protocol leveraged by NTCIP is STMP (Simple Transportation Management Protocol).

entry.name: ntcip-tftp
entry.description: National Transportation Communications for Intelligent Transportation System (ITS) Protocol (NTCIP) is a family of standards that provides both the rules for communicating (called protocols) and the vocabulary (called objects) necessary to allow electronic traffic control equipment from different manufacturers to operate with each other as a system. One such communication protocol leveraged by NTCIP is TFTP (Trivial File Transfer Protocol).

entry.name: nurgo-brainsoup
entry.description: BrainSoup is a personal AI platform, developed by Nurgo Software, that allows users to create custom AI agents to assist with various tasks.

entry.name: openai-sora
entry.description: Sora is OpenAI's video generation model, designed to take text, image, and video inputs and generate a new video as an output.

entry.name: openai-sora-download
entry.description: Sora is OpenAI's video generation model, designed to take text, image, and video inputs and generate a new video as an output.

entry.name: openai-sora-post
entry.description: Sora is OpenAI's video generation model, designed to take text, image, and video inputs and generate a new video as an output.

entry.name: openai-sora-upload
entry.description: Sora is OpenAI's video generation model, designed to take text, image, and video inputs and generate a new video as an output.

entry.name: pythagora-gpt-pilot
entry.description: GPT Pilot works with the developer to create a fully working production-ready app.

entry.name: reddit-create
entry.description: Reddit is an entertainment, social networking service and news website where registered community members can submit content, such as text posts or direct links.

entry.name: reddit-delete
entry.description: Reddit is an entertainment, social networking service and news website where registered community members can submit content, such as text posts or direct links.

entry.name: reddit-upload

entry.name: salesforce-agentforce
entry.description: Agentforce is Salesforce's AI-driven platform designed to create, deploy, and manage autonomous agents that can perform tasks across various business functions including sales, service, marketing, and operations.

entry.name: service-now-ai-agents
entry.description: Servicenow AI Agents are managed by the AI Agent Studio. Users can create AI agents to perform IT, customer service, and HR tasks.

entry.name: sharepoint-online-create
entry.description: SharePoint Online delivers the powerful features of SharePoint without the associated overhead of managing the infrastructure on your own. Flexible management options ensure that you still retain the control you need to meet the compliance requirements of your organization. You can purchase SharePoint in the cloud as a standalone offering or as part of an Office 365 suite where you could also get access to Exchange, Lync, the Office clients and web apps.

entry.name: sharepoint-online-delete
entry.description: SharePoint Online delivers the powerful features of SharePoint without the associated overhead of managing the infrastructure on your own. Flexible management options ensure that you still retain the control you need to meet the compliance requirements of your organization. You can purchase SharePoint in the cloud as a standalone offering or as part of an Office 365 suite where you could also get access to Exchange, Lync, the Office clients and web apps.

entry.name: sharepoint-online-post
entry.description: SharePoint Online delivers the powerful features of SharePoint without the associated overhead of managing the infrastructure on your own. Flexible management options ensure that you still retain the control you need to meet the compliance requirements of your organization. You can purchase SharePoint in the cloud as a standalone offering or as part of an Office 365 suite where you could also get access to Exchange, Lync, the Office clients and web apps.

entry.name: synthesia-create
entry.description: Synthesia creates professional videos without mics, cameras, or actors with AI Video Generator, AI avatars and voiceovers in over 120 languages. This App-ID covers the creating traffic of Synthesia.

entry.name: synthesia-delete
entry.description: Synthesia creates professional videos without mics, cameras, or actors with AI Video Generator, AI avatars and voiceovers in over 120 languages. This App-ID covers the deleting traffic of Synthesia.

entry.name: synthesia-download
entry.description: Synthesia creates professional videos without mics, cameras, or actors with AI Video Generator, AI avatars and voiceovers in over 120 languages. This App-ID covers the downloading traffic of Synthesia.

entry.name: synthesia-edit
entry.description: Synthesia creates professional videos without mics, cameras, or actors with AI Video Generator, AI avatars and voiceovers in over 120 languages. This App-ID covers the editing traffic of Synthesia.

entry.name: synthesia-invite
entry.description: Synthesia creates professional videos without mics, cameras, or actors with AI Video Generator, AI avatars and voiceovers in over 120 languages. This App-ID covers the inviting traffic of Synthesia.

entry.name: synthesia-move
entry.description: Synthesia creates professional videos without mics, cameras, or actors with AI Video Generator, AI avatars and voiceovers in over 120 languages. This App-ID covers the moving traffic of Synthesia.

entry.name: synthesia-upload
entry.description: Synthesia creates professional videos without mics, cameras, or actors with AI Video Generator, AI avatars and voiceovers in over 120 languages. This App-ID covers the uploading traffic of Synthesia.

entry.description: TransferXL provides an easy and convenient way to transfer and share huge files over the internet.

entry.name: twitter-delete
entry.description: Twitter (now rebranded as X) is a social media platform where users post and interact with short messages called tweets (now referred to as posts).

entry.name: ufile
entry.description: UFile is a free platform for sharing data like files, images, music, video and more.

entry.name: xai-grok-upload
entry.description: xAI Grok is a new AI system developed by xAI, an artificial intelligence company, which was launched in 2023. Grok is designed to integrate with X (formerly Twitter) to help users interact with the platform using AI-driven assistance.

entry.description: Zoho Accounts provides customers a centralized resource to manage account access across the suite of Zoho products and services.
